statement: PHOSPHENE's native execution path evaluates MilkDrop per-frame EEL programs in the operator-only subset (assignment, +, -, *, unary minus, parentheses, sequential statements, explicit variable pools) exactly as the reference execution defines, including cross-step state threading by the native executor.
applicability: MilkDrop per-frame expression programs restricted to the operator-only subset over fully explicit variable pools; division, uninitialized-read defaults, and the EEL function library are separate requirements with their own authorities and oracles
completionRelevance: first product-specific vertical path; scoped requirement counted by the global verify gate
